title: Peppery Flaky Norwegian Tomato Toast
description: A quick, peppery tomato toast topped with flaky rye bread, perfect for a post-workout snack.

ingredients.name: Rye bread slices
ingredients.notes: Use fresh rye bread, seed-free for nut-free

instructions: Preheat oven to 200 °C (400 °F). Place rye bread slices on a baking sheet.
Brush each slice with olive oil, then sprinkle smoked paprika, cracked black pepper, and sea salt.
Bake for 8–10 minutes until the edges are flaky and golden.
Meanwhile, warm the tomato puree in a small saucepan over low heat; stir in a pinch of salt and pepper, and simmer 3–4 minutes.
Spread the warmed tomato puree evenly over the toasted bread.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves and serve immediately.
